book: What Captures The Heart Goes In The Cart — Trevor Bradford (2025)
source: skills/idea/_source/book.txt (full pdftotext, 4959 lines, 11 chapters + front/back matter); book_layout.txt for tables; _inventory.md = canonical section map
resume_protocol: Read _state.json + _coverage.md + _source/_inventory.md first. Author the chapter named in `next`. Do NOT re-run the inventory agents — the map is in _inventory.md. After authoring: fill the chapter's forward-mapping table in _coverage.md, mark it done here, run the structure check (<=5 children per content folder), then schedule the next iteration.
granularity_rule: one skill = one concept or one tactic; verbatim composite assets (the 15-row trigger table, canvas tables, the 5-stage signpost map, the risk/timing/friction brand lists, the MyBrand Supplements system-prompt, the reading list) stay as ONE skill, word-for-word.
structure_rule: <=5 children per folder INCLUDING root, recursive. All content categories (00-foundations..04-science-and-research) live under skills/idea/framework/ so root stays at <=5 (README.md,_state.json,_coverage.md,_source/,framework/). Justified in _coverage.md.
format_spec: YAML frontmatter {chapter, section, source_pages, type: concept|tactic|framework|science|reference, status} + '# SKILL — <Title>' + '## Purpose' + '---' + content. Cross-link related skills with [[slug]].

top_level.00-foundations: Introduction, Ch1 Ecommerce Landscape, Ch2 IDEA Framework
top_level.02-brand: Ch4 Authentically Human, Ch5 Brand Canvas, Ch6 Brand Voice
top_level.03-apply: Ch7 Custom GPT, Ch9 Product Development, Ch10 Personal Brand
top_level.04-science-and-research: Ch11 Research Guide, cross-cutting behavioral science, Further Reading

skills_written_note: per-file list lives in _coverage.md forward-mapping tables; chapter `status:done` flags are the resume source of truth
next: DONE — all chapters authored, verified, cleaned up, README written
top_level_note: content lives under framework/; the 5 categories are framework/00-foundations, framework/01-customer, framework/02-brand, framework/03-apply, framework/04-science-and-research
corrections: Read-tool line numbers run ~+184 vs grep/wc late in book (form-feeds); verification is content-based
old_19_disposition: 12 pure-duplicates removed; 7 beyond-the-book skills MOVED to skills/idea-bonus-pack/ (paid add-on). Launch library skills/idea/ is book-only.
